title: Solo Leveling
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (12) + S2 (13, eps 13-25) = 25 total. Paired with the DUBU manhwa (201 chapters, finished). Both adapt the Chugong web novel. S3 announced. Per-arc chapter boundaries approximate.

movies.title: Solo Leveling: ReAwakening
movies.note: S1 recap plus early premiere of the first two S2 episodes.
